name: ASAbility
brief_description: Base resource for defining abilities within the module.
description: [ASAbility] defines the logic and data for a specific action. It manages its own costs, cooldowns, and tags.

properties.name: ability_duration
properties.description: Base duration of the ability.

properties.name: ability_duration_policy
properties.description: Defines how the ability duration is handled (0: Instant, 1: Duration, 2: Infinite).

properties.name: ability_name
properties.description: Unique name for this ability.

properties.name: ability_tag
properties.description: The unique tag identifying this ability.

properties.name: ability_use_custom_duration
properties.description: If true, triggers custom magnitude calculation for duration.

properties.name: activation_blocked_all_tags
properties.description: Ability cannot activate if owner has [b]all[/b] of these tags simultaneously (AND logic).

properties.name: activation_blocked_any_tags
properties.description: Ability cannot activate if owner has [b]any[/b] of these tags (OR logic).

properties.name: activation_cancel_tags
properties.description: Tags of active abilities that will be canceled when this ability activates.

properties.name: activation_owned_tags
properties.description: Tags granted to the owner while the ability is active.

properties.name: activation_required_all_tags
properties.description: Owner must have [b]all[/b] of these tags to activate (AND logic).

properties.name: activation_required_any_tags
properties.description: Owner must have [b]at least one[/b] of these tags to activate (OR logic).

properties.name: cooldown_duration
properties.description: Base duration of cooldown.

properties.name: cooldown_tags
properties.description: Tags applied during cooldown.

properties.name: cooldown_use_custom
properties.description: If true, triggers custom magnitude calculation for cooldown duration.

properties.name: costs
properties.description: Array of native costs (attribute and amount).

properties.name: costs_use_custom
properties.description: If true, triggers custom magnitude calculation for modifier amounts.

properties.name: cues
properties.description: Visual/Audio cues triggered on start and end.

properties.name: effects
properties.description: List of effects applied by this ability.

properties.name: events_on_activate
properties.description: Events dispatched when the ability is successfully activated.

properties.name: events_on_end
properties.description: Events dispatched when the ability ends (regardless of whether it was canceled or finished naturally).

properties.name: phases
properties.description: Sequential phases that this ability will execute in order.

properties.name: requirements
properties.description: Attribute requirements needed to activate the ability.

properties.name: sub_abilities
properties.description: Hierarchical sub-abilities that are unlocked alongside this parent ability.

properties.name: sub_abilities_auto_activate
properties.description: Tags of sub-abilities that should automatically activate when the parent ability starts.

properties.name: triggers
properties.description: Automatic triggers for this ability (e.g. activate when a tag is added).

methods.name: _on_activate_ability
methods.description: Virtual method to implement the ability's logic.

methods.name: _on_can_activate_ability
methods.description: Virtual method to implement custom activation requirements.

methods.name: _on_end_ability
methods.description: Virtual method called when the ability ends.

methods.name: activate_ability
methods.description: Starts the ability execution. Handles native costs and cooldown application automatically.

methods.name: add_requirement
methods.description: Adds a prerequisite attribute value required for the ability to activate. Unlike costs, requirements do not consume the attribute; they only verify the current value.

methods.name: add_trigger
methods.description: Registers an automatic activation trigger based on Global Tags or ASEvents. For example, an ability can be triggered when 'State.OnFire' is added to the actor.

methods.name: apply_costs
methods.description: Applies the costs of the ability to the owner.

methods.name: calculate_ability_duration
methods.description: Calculates the duration of the ability, considering [member ability_use_custom_duration].

methods.name: can_activate_ability
methods.description: Returns true if the ability can be activated (checks tags, costs, and cooldown).

methods.name: can_afford_costs
methods.description: Checks if the owner has enough resources to afford the costs.

methods.name: can_satisfy_requirements
methods.description: Checks if the owner satisfies the attribute requirements defined in this ability.

methods.name: end_ability
methods.description: Ends the ability execution and cleans up owned tags.

methods.name: get_cost_amount
methods.description: Returns the cost amount for a specific attribute of this ability.

methods.name: get_requirement_amount
methods.description: Returns the numeric requirement value for a specific attribute of this ability.

methods.name: get_requirement_count
methods.description: Returns the total number of attribute prerequisites defined for this ability.

methods.name: remove_cost
methods.description: Removes a cost definition for a specific attribute.

methods.name: remove_requirement
methods.description: Removes an attribute requirement by its tag name. Returns true if the requirement existed and was successfully removed.

constants.name: POLICY_INSTANT
constants.description: Ability triggers its effect once and ends immediately.

constants.name: POLICY_INFINITE
constants.description: Ability remains active until explicitly ended.

constants.name: TRIGGER_ON_TAG_ADDED
constants.description: Ability attempts to activate when a specific Tag is added to the owner.

constants.name: TRIGGER_ON_TAG_REMOVED
constants.description: Ability attempts to activate when a specific Tag is removed from the owner.

constants.name: TRIGGER_ON_EVENT
constants.description: Ability attempts to activate when a specific ASEventTag is dispatched to the owner. This is the preferred way for reactive triggers like "Counter-attack on Hit".
